title: New Semester Registration Open
content: We are officially accepting new members for the Spring 2026 semester. Applications close next week, so make sure to register early.
author: Club President

title: Room Change for Weekly Meeting
content: Please note that this week's meeting will take place in Room 310 instead of Room 204 due to maintenance work.
author: Club Secretary

title: Workshop Reminder
content: Don't forget about our AI Tools Workshop this Saturday at 4 PM. Bring your laptop and charger.
author: Event Coordinator

title: Spring Festival Auditions
content: Auditions for the Spring Music Festival are now open. Sign up through the club portal before March 1st.
author: Music Director

title: Rehearsal Schedule Update
content: Rehearsals will now be held every Thursday at 6 PM in the Main Auditorium.
author: Club Secretary
